subject: Alolan Grimer — a sludge Pokemon with a jagged grin and distinctive two-tone crown marking
description: A bulky sludge creature fills the foreground, its body a dark greyish-green mass with a wide jagged-toothed grin. The top of its head displays a lighter, almost crown-like coloration that distinguishes this Alolan regional variant. The background suggests an urban or industrial setting — a chain-link fence or wire structure is visible behind the creature, consistent with the flavor text about garbage disposal. The creature faces forward with a menacing but somewhat comic grin.
foreground: dark grey-green sludge creature with jagged grin and pale crown marking
